# public/

Files in this directory are served as static assets by Vite.

## films_embedded.json

**DO NOT edit this file directly.**

This file is a generated copy of the canonical source at the project root (`films_embedded.json`).

To update film data:
1. Edit `films_embedded.json` in the project root
2. Run `npm run sync:films` to copy it here

The `prebuild` hook runs this automatically before `npm run build`.
